name: aethercode-kindle
description: AetherCode — Governed AI Workspace for Kindle Fire

scripts.cap:init: npx cap init AetherCode com.issdandavis.aethercode --web-dir www
scripts.build:apk:kindle: cross-env AETHERCODE_TARGET=kindle npm run build && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.build:apk:aetherbrowse: cross-env AETHERCODE_APP_VARIANT=aetherbrowse npm run build && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.build:apk:aetherbrowse:kindle: cross-env AETHERCODE_APP_VARIANT=aetherbrowse AETHERCODE_TARGET=kindle npm run build && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.build:aab:aetherbrowse: cross-env AETHERCODE_APP_VARIANT=aetherbrowse npm run build && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
scripts.build:aab:aetherbrowse:kindle: cross-env AETHERCODE_APP_VARIANT=aetherbrowse AETHERCODE_TARGET=kindle npm run build && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
scripts.build: npm run copy:assets && npm run cap:sync

author: Issac Davis <issdandavis@gmail.com>
